popularStory.description:
William (Seton) de Seton (abt. 1348 - abt. 1409)

William (Seton) de Seton
Sir William de Seton formerly Seton aka Laird of Seton
Born about 1348 in Seton, East Lothian, Scotlandmap

zh.lifeSummary: Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton是Alan Seton de Wyntown和Margaret Seton的兒子，於大約1348年出生。他於1370年與Janet Fleming在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾西頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1410年在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton是Alan Seton de Wyntown和Margaret Seton的儿子，于大约1348年出生。他于1370年与Janet Fleming在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾西頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1410年在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Seton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and English: variant of   Seaton  .

variants.name: Seaton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Seaton, such as those in Cumberland, Devon, Durham, Leicestershire, Northumberland, Rutland, East Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire, most of which derive from Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though the Leicestershire placename probably arises from an Old English personal name Sǣga or a stream-name Sǣge (from Old English sǣge ‘slow moving’; compare Seabrook ) + Old English tūn.
Scottish: habitational name from Seton (East Lothian), from Old English sǣ ‘sea’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton was born about 1348 as the son of Alan Seton de Wyntown and Margaret Seton. He married Janet Fleming in 1370, in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. He died in 1410, in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton est né environ 1348, fils de Alan Seton de Wyntown et Margaret Seton. Il a épousé Janet Fleming en 1370, à Seton, Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé en 1410, à Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton wurde um 1348, als Sohn von Alan Seton de Wyntown und Margaret Seton geboren. Er hat 1370 in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland Janet Fleming geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb 1410 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton è nato il circa 1348 come figlio di Alan Seton de Wyntown e Margaret Seton. Lui sposato Janet Fleming nel 1370, nel Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1410, nel Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Seton 1st Lord Setonは約1348年にAlan Seton de WyntownとMargaret Setonの息子として生まれた。1370年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアセトンでJanet Flemingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1410年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアハッドイントンで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton(은)는 대략 1348년 Alan Seton de Wyntown(와)과 Margaret Seton의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1370년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 세턴에서 Janet Fleming(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1410년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 하딩턴에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton nasceu aproximadamente 1348 filho de Alan Seton de Wyntown e Margaret Seton. Ele casou-se com Janet Fleming em 1370, em Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1410, em Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton родился около 1348 г. Его родителей звали Alan Seton de Wyntown и Margaret Seton. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Fleming в 1370 г. в местности сетон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер в 1410 г. в местности хаддингтон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton nació aproximadamente 1348 como hijo de Alan Seton de Wyntown y Margaret Seton. Se casó con Janet Fleming en 1370, en Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1410, en Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 63 años.
